doc_content.summary: End-to-end project bootstrapping skill that automates git initialization, GitHub repository creation in the GetEvinced org, GitHub App connections, and Claude Code environment setup.
key_features: Idempotent execution phases allowing safe re-runs and partial setups
Automated project type detection for tailored .gitignore and CLAUDE.md files
Integration with github_app.py for JWT-based GitHub App token management
Automatic CODEOWNERS generation and standardized repo topic assignment

alt_text: A technical flowchart and architecture visualization for the stark-onboard-project skill, detailing git initialization, GitHub repository creation, GitHub App connections, and Claude Code bootstrapping, with failure modes and observability metrics.
